common.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

auth.magicLinkDescription: We'll send you a magic link to sign in without a password

auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a password reset link shortly. Check your inbox.
auth.resetRequestError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.resetError: Could not reset password. The link may have expired.
auth.resetTokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to

auth.verifyEmailRequired: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.verifyEmailResendError: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.
auth.changeEmailDesc: Enter your account password to complete the email change.
auth.changeEmailSuccessDesc: You'll need to sign in again with your new email.
auth.changeEmailVerifyError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.changeEmailExpired: This link has expired or is invalid.
auth.changeEmailHint: Your old email stays active until this change is confirmed.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your design review activity
dashboard.overviewSubtitle: Here's an overview of your firm's design pipeline
dashboard.noActivityHint: Activity will show up here as your team uploads files, reviews designs, and updates projects.
dashboard.noDeadlinesHint: Projects with deadlines set will appear here as they approach.
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Create your first project to start tracking designs, reviews, and team progress.

projects.title: All Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage and track all design review projects
projects.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the project and all its files, phases, and reviews. This action cannot be undone.

projectDetail.title: Project Detail

projectDetail.noCommentsYet: No comments yet. Be the first to leave feedback.

projectDetail.bulkRemoveConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {count} file(s)? This cannot be undone.
projectDetail.bulkSendToClientError: Failed to send files to client.

designReview.title: Design Review
designReview.approvedDescription: Great! The design has been approved.
designReview.rejectedDescription: The design has been rejected and the team will be notified.

designReview.commentPostedDescription: Your feedback has been added to the review.

clientReview.title: Client Review

clientReview.changesRequestedDescription: Your feedback has been sent to the design team.

createProject.noArchitects: No architects in your organisation yet. Invite members first.
createProject.noClients: No clients in your organisation yet. Invite a client first.
createProject.clientEmailHint: The client will receive a review link when designs are approved.
createProject.createdDescription: Your new project has been created successfully.

editProject.title: Edit Project

editProject.noArchitects: No architects available in your organisation.

settings.passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.

settings.changeEmailSentDesc: Check your new email for a verification link.

emptyStates.projectsDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or create a new project to get started.
emptyStates.designSectionsDescription: Upload your first design to get started with reviews.
emptyStates.notificationsDescription: You have no notifications right now. We'll let you know when something needs your attention.

emptyStates.teamDescription: Invite your first team member to start collaborating on projects.
emptyStates.clientProjectsDescription: You'll see your projects here once your architect shares them with you.
emptyStates.commentsDescription: Be the first to leave feedback on this design.

organisation.title: Organisation
organisation.noOrgSubtitle: You haven't created an organisation yet.
organisation.createSubtitle: Set up your firm's workspace to manage projects and team members.
organisation.createError: Failed to create organisation. Please try again.
organisation.alreadyExists: An organisation with this slug already exists. Try a different name.
organisation.createdDescription: Your organisation has been set up successfully.

organisation.inviteSentDescription: An email invitation has been sent.
organisation.inviteError: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.
organisation.roleUpdatedDescription: The member's role has been updated.

elements.title: Elements
elements.subtitle: Master catalogue of construction elements
elements.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, code, or description
elements.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or create a new element.
elements.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press space
elements.categoryDeleteBlocked: Can't delete — {count} elements still use this category (or a sub-category). Move or reassign them first.
elements.starterDialogTitle: Get started with a starter taxonomy
elements.starterDialogDesc: Pick the categories that match your work. You can edit or delete any of them later.
elements.codeExists: An element with this code already exists
elements.confirmArchiveDesc: Archived elements won't appear in BOQs but can be restored later.
elements.importSubtitle: Upload an .xlsx file to add or update elements in bulk.
elements.importDropzone: Drop an .xlsx file here or click to browse
elements.importMissingColumnsHint: The file can't be imported until these columns are added. The preview below shows what was found so you can spot the gap.
elements.importDuplicateColumnsTitle: Duplicate columns (only the last one is used)
elements.importTruncatedHint: Only the first 10,000 rows were previewed. Split the file and import again for the remainder.
elements.importStrategyDesc: Choose how to handle rows whose code matches an existing element.
elements.importStrategy_skip_desc: Keep existing elements untouched. Only insert rows with new codes.
elements.importStrategy_overwrite_desc: Update existing elements in place with the values from the sheet.
elements.importStrategy_version_desc: Insert a new row with a -v2 (or next available) suffix so history is preserved.
elements.exportTruncatedDesc: Only the first rows were exported ({total} total match your filters). Narrow the filters to export the remainder.
elements.importTooLarge: File is too large — max 5 MB.
elements.importMultipleFiles: Only the first file will be imported.
elements.featureDisabled: Element library feature is not yet enabled.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.subtitle: Suppliers, subcontractors, and trade vendors
vendors.searchPlaceholder: Search by company, trading name, or code
vendors.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or create a new vendor.
vendors.portalLinkedDescription: {email} is already in the organisation — linked to this contact.
vendors.inviteSentDescription: An invite has been sent to {email}.
vendors.inviteError: Couldn't send the invitation. Please try again.
vendors.pickCategoryHint: Pick a category for each trade row.
vendors.confirmSoftDesc: Inactive vendors are hidden from RFQ pickers but kept in history.
vendors.confirmHardDesc: This cannot be undone. All contacts and trade assignments will be removed.
vendors.bankAuditNote: Bank-detail reads and writes are recorded in the audit log.
vendors.bankNotice: Bank details are encrypted at rest. Only PMs can view or edit.
vendors.confirmClearBankDesc: The encrypted record will be removed. You can re-enter it later.
vendors.kycStatusChangeDesc: Change the vendor's KYC status. Optional notes are recorded with your action.
vendors.kycConfirmRemoveDesc: The record is removed from the vendor. The file in storage is kept.
vendors.featureDisabled: Vendor management feature is not yet enabled.

rateContracts.title: Rate Contracts
rateContracts.subtitle: Vendor-scoped, time-bound element pricing
rateContracts.activeLockedNotice: This contract is active and may already be referenced by BOQ items. To keep downstream pricing consistent, only notes / terms / agreement / payment terms can be changed. To revise other fields, cancel this contract and create a new one.
rateContracts.featureDisabled: Rate contracts feature is not yet enabled.
rateContracts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, number, or vendor
rateContracts.emptyHint: Create one to lock in vendor pricing for the next BOQ.
rateContracts.confirmActivateDesc: The contract becomes available to BOQs. You can still cancel it later.
rateContracts.confirmCancelDesc: Existing BOQ items keep their snapshot, but no new BOQ items can be priced from this contract.
rateContracts.itemsEmptyHint: Add elements to set rates. The contract can be activated once it has at least one item.
rateContracts.itemPickerNoMatchingCurrency: No elements priced in {currency}. Add one to the library first, or change the contract currency while it's still draft.
rateContracts.boqPickerEmpty: No active rate contracts cover the available elements.
rateContracts.boqPickerResultCapped: Showing the first {count} matches — refine the search to narrow further.

vendorPortal.title: Vendor Dashboard
vendorPortal.subtitle: Welcome to your portal — RFQs, purchase orders, and progress reports in one place.
vendorPortal.noRfqsHint: RFQs assigned to your company will appear here.
vendorPortal.noPOsHint: POs issued to your company will appear here.
vendorPortal.noProgressHint: Once you have active POs, daily progress entries will appear here.
vendorPortal.noInvoicesHint: Invoices you raise against POs will appear here.
vendorPortal.comingSoonHint: This section is part of an upcoming release.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your company details, contacts, bank info, and KYC documents.
profile.removeContactDesc: Remove this contact from your vendor record? This action cannot be undone.
profile.contactLinkedDesc: This contact is linked to a portal user. Ask your project manager to revoke the link first.
profile.suspendedDesc: Your vendor account has been suspended. Contact your project manager for details. You can review your information but cannot make changes.
